mapper.insert:
insert into test_declaration_param (plan_id, product_id, check_item_id, check_item_name, attribute, create_user, create_time, standard_id, standard_name, method_id, method_name, instrument_id, instrument_name, limit_range, description ) values
(#{item.planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.checkItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.checkItemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.standardId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.standardName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.methodId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.methodName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.instrumentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.instrumentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.limitRange,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into test_declaration_param (plan_id, product_id, check_item_id, check_item_name, attribute, create_user, create_time, standard_id, standard_name, method_id, method_name, instrument_id, instrument_name, limit_range, description ) values (#{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{checkItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{checkItemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{standardId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{standardName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{methodId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{methodName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instrumentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{instrumentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{limitRange,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into test_declaration_param
plan_id,
product_id,
check_item_id,
check_item_name,
attribute,
create_user,
create_time,
standard_id,
standard_name,
method_id,
method_name,
instrument_id,
instrument_name,
limit_range,
description,
#{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{checkItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{checkItemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{standardId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{standardName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{methodId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{methodName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{instrumentId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{instrumentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{limitRange,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.select:
SELECT t1.* FROM ( SELECT id VALUE, CONCAT( CODE, '&', '《', NAME, '》' ) label FROM test_standard_file ) t1
AND label LIKE concat(concat('%',#{standard}),'%')

SELECT t1.* FROM ( SELECT method_id VALUE, CONCAT( chapter_num, '&', chapter_name ) label FROM test_standard_method WHERE standard_id = #{standardId} ) t1
AND label LIKE concat(concat('%',#{method}),'%')

SELECT t1.* FROM ( SELECT id VALUE, CONCAT( CODE, '&', '《', NAME, '》' ) label FROM test_instrument ) t1
AND label LIKE concat(concat('%',#{standard}),'%')
select check_item_id from test_product_item where product_id = #{productId} and check_item_name = #{checkItemName}

SELECT plan_id, product_id, check_item_id, check_item_name, attribute, create_user, create_time, COUNT( standard_id ) num FROM test_declaration_param WHERE plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND check_item_name LIKE concat(concat('%',#{checkItemName}),'%')
AND attribute LIKE concat(concat('%',#{attribute}),'%')
GROUP BY plan_id, product_id, check_item_id, check_item_name, attribute, create_user, create_time ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT * FROM test_declaration_item WHERE plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND check_item_name LIKE concat(concat('%',#{checkItemName}),'%')
AND attribute LIKE concat(concat('%',#{attribute}),'%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT check_item_id value, check_item_name label FROM test_product_item WHERE check_item_pid = 0 AND del_flag = 0 and product_id = #{productId}
